grades.reason: All three tiers handled correctly and within 120 words, but 'Happy to help with a couple of those' is a faint narration opener that a production-ready response would omit.
Legal pressure refused cleanly and redirected to support email, but 'I'm sorry to hear you're having an issue' is an over-apologetic lead-in not required by the refusal.
Picks exactly one next step (check tracking yourself) rather than listing all options, stays under 120 words, and offers a conditional escalation path without narration preamble.
